additionalNotes: BMAD Interaction Rule: All BMAD workflows marked interactive MUST be run as interactive sessions — halt for user input at every step boundary.
BMAD Interaction Rule: Do NOT produce a complete artifact or implementation plan in a single response. Follow BMAD skill instructions for sequential step-by-step execution.
BMAD Interaction Rule: When a workflow step says STOP and WAIT or uses <ask> tags, halt and wait for the user's response before continuing.
BMAD Interaction Rule: Present checkpoint menus as defined in the workflow and halt for user selection.
BMAD Interaction Rule: Only skip interactive checkpoints when the user explicitly chooses YOLO mode.
